payload.answer: I don’t have a durable-memory action to take from this context alone. If you want this remembered, please choose an option.
repair_options: Do not save this weather context as durable memory.
Save today’s weather as a short-lived/contextual note only, if supported.
Save a durable memory that today’s weather is cloudy.
Clarify the location/date this weather applies to before saving.
